<onlyinclude><templatestyles src="Infobox_resource/styles.css" /><infobox theme="resource-infobox">
    <title source="name">
        <format><center>'''{{{name}}}'''{{#if: {{{rarity|}}} | <br/><span class="rarity-{{{rarity}}}" style="font-size: 0.7em; font-weight: normal;">{{{rarity}}}</span>}}</format>
    </title>
    <image source="icon">
        <format>[[File:{{{icon}}}|center|alt=Icon of {{{name}}}]]</format>
    </image>
    <panel>
        <data source="max">
            <label>Max</label>
            <format>{{{max}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="is_item">
            <label>Item</label>
            <format>{{{is_item}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="visibility">
            <label>Visibility</label>
            <format>{{{visibility}}}</format>
        </data>{{#if: {{{api_name|}}} |
        <section collapse="closed">
            <header>Technical Information</header>
            <data source="api_name">
                <label>API Name</label>
                <format><code>{{{api_name}}}</code></format>
            </data>
        </section>}}
    </panel>
</infobox></onlyinclude>
==Documentation==
This template displays a resource (currency, crafting material, consumable item) in a Portable Infobox.

==How to Use==
<pre>
{{Infobox resource
|name = Display name (e.g. "Saxonite")
|api_name = Internal ID (e.g. "saxonite")
|icon = Icon filename
|rarity = Standard | Rare | Epic | Exotic
|max = Stack/inventory cap
|is_item = Yes | No
|visibility = AlwaysShow | ShowIfAnyOwned | DontShow
|color = Optional theme color (hex)
}}
</pre>

==Example Usage==
<pre>
{{Infobox resource
|name = Saxonite
|api_name = saxonite
|icon = Saxonite_icon.png
|rarity = Epic
|max = 999
|is_item = No
|visibility = AlwaysShow
}}
</pre>
===Result===
{{Infobox resource
|name = Saxonite
|api_name = saxonite
|icon = Saxonite_icon.png
|rarity = Epic
|max = 999
|is_item = No
|visibility = AlwaysShow
}}

[[Category:Templates]]
